basic_details.job_title: ESIC Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 28 Senior Resident and Tutor/ Demonstrator Posts
basic_details.short_information: ESIC Medical College and Hospital (ESIC) Senior Resident and Tutor/Demonstrator Recruitment 2026 Notification has been released on 14 May 2026 on the official website. A total of 28 vacancies have been announced through the ESIC Senior Resident and Tutor/Demonstrator Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age Relaxation: As per Central Government rules (5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC, applicable for PwD).

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree (MD/MS/DNB) in relevant subject, MBBS, M.Sc. + Ph.D.
qualification.details: Senior Resident: Postgraduate degree (MD/MS/DNB) in relevant subject OR M.Sc. + Ph.D. in Anatomy / Biochemistry / Physiology (for non-clinical subjects). Must have valid/up-to-date NMC / State Medical Council registration. Tutor / Demonstrator: MBBS + valid NMC / State Medical Council registration OR (for non-clinical / pre-clinical departments): M.Sc. + Ph.D. in relevant medical subject.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 1,35,000/- approx - Rs. 1,60,000/- approx Per Month
salary_details.details: Rs. 1,35,000/- approx - Rs. 1,60,000/- approx Per Month

selection_process: Document Verification Walk-in Interview Assessment based on academic credentials and interview performance

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews are scheduled from 20th May 2026 to 23rd May 2026, depending on the specific post. Candidates should ensure they attend on the correct date for their desired position.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies released by ESIC?
faq.answer: ESIC has released a total of 28 vacancies for the posts of Senior Resident and Tutor/Demonstrator.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: For the Senior Resident post, candidates need a Postgraduate degree (MD/MS/DNB) in the relevant subject or M.Sc. + Ph.D. in Anatomy/Biochemistry/Physiology (for non-clinical subjects), along with valid registration.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the ESIC recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per Central Government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The approximate salary offered for these positions ranges from Rs. 1,35,000/- to Rs. 1,60,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the ESIC recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to report at the specified venue with all required documents on the interview dates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for ESIC recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 300/- for General/OBC candidates and Rs. 125/- for SC/ST candidates. PwBD and Women candidates are exempted from the fee.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the ESIC Medical College and Hospital located?
faq.answer: The ESIC Medical College and Hospital is located in Mumbai, Maharashtra, with the pincode 400093.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for ESIC recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves Document Verification, a Walk-in Interview, and an assessment based on academic credentials and interview performance.
